# Shreyas Peddi

> Jr. AI Engineer building agentic RAG pipelines, pgvector stores, and LLM microservices on GCP. Based in Atlanta, GA.

## About

Shreyas Peddi is a Jr. AI Engineer at Octave Holdings & Investments (Alpharetta, GA). He builds production AI systems using Google Gemini API, agentic RAG pipelines with pgvector, and GCP-hosted microservices. He holds an MS in Computer Science from the University of Georgia (GPA 3.7, 2023–2025).

Before AI engineering, Shreyas shipped RESTful microservice APIs and React apps at Byju's (100K+ DAU), automated CI/CD infrastructure at NCR Atleos, and published research in federated learning and medical AI.

## Current Role

- **Title**: Jr. AI Engineer
- **Company**: Octave Holdings & Investments
- **Location**: Alpharetta, GA
- **Since**: August 2025
- **Key Projects**:
  - Built agentic RAG pipelines using Gemini API embeddings with a pgvector store to extract and structure data from 10,000+ CRE lease documents — cutting deal-analysis time by 60%
  - Deployed a production lease-intelligence microservice on GCP (Cloud Run + Cloud Storage) with sub-second semantic retrieval across 500+ embedded documents
  - Designed few-shot prompt templates for 200+ structured fields per lease (rent, CAM caps, escalation terms), reducing hallucination rates by 40%
  - Implemented Twilio SMS MFA and hardened cloud infrastructure with monitoring — 99.9% uptime

## Past Experience

- **NCR Atleos** — Software Engineer Intern (May 2024 – Aug 2024, Atlanta, GA)
  - Automated REST API functional test suites in Postman with Azure DevOps CI/CD — cut manual QA effort by 400%; adopted across 3 teams
  - Built Logstash CI/CD pipelines with JFrog Artifactory and SonarQube quality gates — 50% fewer deployment errors, 2 days faster releases
- **Byju's** — Software Engineer (Jun 2022 – Mar 2023, Bengaluru, India)
  - Developed 20+ RESTful microservice APIs in Node.js/Express.js integrated with CRM systems — 30% less data-sync latency
  - Built 30+ marketing web pages in React.js serving 100K+ DAU with zero downtime and 25% faster page-load times
- **HighRadius** — Technology Intern (Jun 2021 – May 2022, Remote)
  - Built internal web tooling for 5+ enterprise accounts — 30% UI performance improvement, 20% fewer manual onboarding steps

## Education

- **MS in Computer Science** — University of Georgia, GPA 3.7 (Aug 2023 – May 2025, Athens, GA)
- **BTech in Computer Science, Data Science** — SRM University, AP, GPA 8.3/10 (Jul 2018 – May 2022, Amaravati, India)

## Technical Skills

- **Languages**: Python, JavaScript, SQL, HTML/CSS
- **Backend & APIs**: Node.js, Express.js, Django, REST APIs, Microservices
- **Frontend**: React.js, Next.js, JavaScript, HTML/CSS
- **Cloud & DevOps**: GCP (Cloud Run, Cloud Storage, Vertex AI), AWS, Docker, CI/CD, Azure DevOps, JFrog Artifactory, Git
- **Databases**: PostgreSQL (pgvector), MySQL, SQLite, MongoDB
- **Testing & QA**: Postman, Unit / Functional / A/B Testing, SonarQube
- **AI / ML**: LLMs, RAG, Prompt Engineering, Fine-tuning, RLHF, Federated Learning, CNNs, Transformers
- **ML Frameworks**: LangChain, PyTorch, TensorFlow, Keras, Hugging Face, Gemini API, Pandas, NumPy

## Notable Projects

- **Lease Abstractor** — Agentic RAG pipeline (Gemini API, pgvector, GCP Cloud Run, Node.js). 10,000+ CRE lease docs, 60% faster deal analysis. Production at Octave Holdings.
- **ProxyFL-Prune** — Pruning-enhanced federated learning (Python, PyTorch, Opacus). 40% model size reduction, differential privacy preserved.
- **Glaucoma Detection CNNs** — Benchmarked ResNet50, DenseNet, MobileNet; 94%+ accuracy on medical imaging datasets (TensorFlow, Keras).

## Publication

Mishra, T.K., Mishra, S.K., Sai, K.J., Peddi, S. and Surusomayajula, M. (2022). "Crop Recommendation System Using Support Vector Machine Considering Indian Dataset." In: *Advances in Distributed Computing and Machine Learning*. Springer, Singapore, pp. 501–510.
